sourcesContent:
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import api from '../utils/api'; const features = [ { icon: 'Golf', title: 'Track Your Game', desc: 'Log your Stableford scores and watch your performance over time.' }, { icon: 'Draw', title: 'Draw Rewards', desc: 'Your scores enter draws. Match numbers to win prizes across reward tiers.' }, { icon: 'Give', title: 'Real Impact', desc: 'Every subscription contributes to a charity you choose and support.' }, { icon: 'Win', title: 'Win And Give', desc: 'Play competitively while backing meaningful causes and campaigns.' }, ]; const tiers = [ { name: 'Bronze', matches: '3 matches', color: 'text-amber-600', bg: 'bg-amber-900/20 border-amber-700/30', desc: 'You are on the board.' }, { name: 'Silver', matches: '4 matches', color: 'text-charcoal-300', bg: 'bg-charcoal-700/30 border-charcoal-600/30', desc: 'Outstanding performance.' }, { name: 'Gold', matches: '5 matches', color: 'text-gold-400', bg: 'bg-gold-900/30 border-gold-700/30', desc: 'The ultimate win.' }, ]; export default function LandingPage() { const [featuredCharities, setFeaturedCharities] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { api.get('/charities?featured=true') .then((response) => setFeaturedCharities(response.data.charities || [])) .catch(() => setFeaturedCharities([])); }, []); return (
Golf Golf Charity
Sign In Get Started
Charity spotlight and reward draws now live

Golf that gives
back.

Subscribe, track your Stableford scores, join reward draws, and support a charity you care about from the moment you sign up.

Start Playing for Good Sign In

More than just a game

A platform where your passion for golf translates into real-world impact.

{features.map((feature) => (
{feature.icon}

{feature.title}

{feature.desc}

))}
{featuredCharities.length > 0 && (

Featured Charities

Spotlight organisations currently highlighted on the platform.

Choose at signup
{featuredCharities.slice(0, 3).map((charity) => (
Spotlight

{charity.name}

{charity.category || 'General'}

{charity.description}

))}
)}

Prize Tiers

Match your scores to draw numbers for a chance to win

{tiers.map((tier) => (
{tier.name}
{tier.matches}
{tier.desc}
))}

Ready to make your swing count?

Join golfers who play with purpose and support real charities.

Join Golf Charity Today
Golf Golf Charity

Copyright 2024 Golf Charity Platform

); }
